request.description: Redirects to GitHub OAuth authorization page. Open this URL in a browser; after approving, GitHub will redirect to the callback URL with a code.

query.description: State value returned by GitHub (CSRF token)

request.description: Exchanges the GitHub authorization code for a JWT. Returns { token }.
Redirects to Google OAuth authorization page. Open this URL in a browser; after approving, Google will redirect to the callback URL with a code.

query.description: State value returned by Google (CSRF token)

request.description: Exchanges the Google authorization code for a JWT. Returns { token }.
Creates a new email account and sends a 6-digit OTP to verify the email. Password must be at least 8 characters. Returns 201 on success.
Authenticates a verified email account with password. Returns { token } directly.
Verifies the 6-digit OTP. Returns { token } on success. The OTP is valid for 10 minutes and can only be used once.

header.description: JWT token obtained from the login callback

request.description: Returns the currently authenticated user. Requires a valid Bearer JWT in the Authorization header.

request.description:
Returns all published articles. Public — no auth required.

Supports filtering by tags (`?tags=tag1,tag2`) and authors (`?authors=author1,author2`), multi-column sort (`?sort=title,created_at`), and a single order direction applied to all columns (`?order=asc`).
